name: vide-electron
description: Bare-bones Electron + Svelte app for VIde.

scripts.preinstall: node -e "const execPath = process.env.npm_execpath || ''; const userAgent = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; const isBun = execPath.includes('bun') || userAgent.startsWith('bun/'); if (!isBun) { console.error('This project uses Bun. Run bun install instead of npm install.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:vite" "bun run dev:electron:build" "bun run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5173 electron-dist/main.js electron-dist/preload.js && nodemon --watch electron-dist --ext js --signal SIGTERM --exec "cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron electron-dist/main.js"
scripts.build: bun run build:renderer && bun run build:electron
